output.final_deliverable: Main Page -> Philosophy -> Philosophy of science -> Science -> Wikipedia (Main Page).
output.action_summary: I will build a chain of at least 4 Wikipedia URLs starting from the Main Page, where each subsequent URL is a link found on the previous page. I will verify adjacency by citing the source pages showing the link to the next page. The chain will be constructed step by step with inline citations to the visited URLs. If any needed link evidence is missing, I will report what is missing instead of guessing.

eb93ab39-733a-428d-ba17-24003857551e.title:
Start at https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page and build a chain of at least 4 Wikipedia URLs. Each next URL must come from links found on the previous visited page. Return the chain in order, and include one verified adjacency pair near the end (show that URL[i] links to URL[i+1]).

Benchmark rule: when external evidence is needed, run search then visit the best URLs. Visit pages to extract concrete details and cite visited URLs in the final answer.

67b69b3a-ca14-4e55-8935-d4ed6cdb009d.title: Plan to build a 4+ node Wikipedia URL chain starting from Main Page

details.expansion_strategy: Sequential exploration using live visits; after each page visit, extract internal Wikipedia article links and select a chain where each next page is one of the current page's links

pages_to_visit.output: list of internal Wikipedia article links available on the page

pages_to_visit.page: A (first chosen link from Main Page)
pages_to_visit.output: list of internal article links to propose B
list of internal article links to propose C
list of internal article links to propose D

adjacency_proof.evidence: anchor link on URL1 to URL2

verification.adjacency_verification: At least one explicit adjacency pair proof: URL[i] contains a hypertext anchor to URL[i+1] (visible in the page source or within the page's content)

outputs.chain_assembly: Ordered list of 4-URL chain with titles
outputs.evidence: Adjacency proof for one consecutive pair

details.notes: All links must be Wikipedia internal article links; avoid disambiguation or non-article pages; if disambiguation pages appear, choose alternative links from the same page.
details.action: Sequential exploration: visit Main Page; identify linked Wikipedia article candidates; traverse to 3 more linked pages to form a chain of length at least 4; verify adjacency by showing that each pair (i -> i+1) is connected via a link on page i; record titles and URLs; provide chain in order with one explicit adjacency proof near the end; cite all visited URLs in the final answer.
